name: 10 Federal Self Storage Acquisition Co. 2
notes: Oversubscribed at $32M. 26 acquisitions, 7,500+ units across the Southeast. 13-asset partial exit reported Q1 2026.

name: 10 Federal Self Storage Acquisition Co. 3
notes: 15 operating facilities, 713,458 NRSF. Q1 2025: same-store revenue +9.0% YoY, NOI +45.1%, opex -12.8%. Includes Jan 2026 Arkansas 7-pack (2,730 units, 487,652 NRSF).

name: 10 Federal Self Storage Acquisition Co. 4
notes: 21 operating facilities. Q1 2025: same-store revenue +11.9% YoY, NOI +42.9%, opex -1.5%. Includes Keller TX 3-pack (177,353 NRSF), Magnolia TX + Montgomery TX expansions (650 units each). Backed by $100M First Horizon credit facility.

name: Opportunistic Offering
notes: Ground-up Class-A multi-story development vehicle. Q3 2024 first close $25M (led by Essentia Capital). Q2 2025 add-on $28M. Targeting $150M total. Funding 8 named development sites (Georgetown TX, Dripping Springs TX, Charlotte NC, Richmond Hill GA, Villa Rica GA, Temple GA, Lake Worth TX, plus pipeline).
